[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: The image shows a game interface with a character standing on a grassy field above a series of weapon and character customization panels.

Main Subject: The main focus is a human-like character in the center of the top portion of the screen, standing upright with one arm extended while holding or aiming a futuristic-looking weapon that emits a purple glow; the character’s head is light-colored and hairless or closely shaved, and the character wears a purple-and-black sleeveless top, dark pants with a white belt area, and white shoes, with a game-style HUD overlay surrounding them.

Setting: The background appears to be an outdoor stadium or arena with a wide grass field in the foreground and large structures and screens beyond it, resembling a multiplayer game lobby or shooting area; lighting appears bright in the top section, while the lower sections show darker, indoor-like UI backdrops with purple and blue neon lighting from the on-screen effects.

Visual Details: The camera angle is a screen-view perspective typical of a video game UI, with multiple overlapping panels. In the top area, the character stands on vivid green grass; behind them are stadium elements and distant displays, and a bright turquoise-blue sky-like gradient spans the background. The UI includes left-side menu items stacked vertically, a top bar with icons and numbers, and right-side icons and a prominent button area. Below the top character view, a large panel shows a weapon or aircraft-like sci-fi design with glowing purple lighting, rotating or displayed in a central compartment. Another panel shows a labeled weapon effect reading “FIST - BUBBLY WAVES,” with a glowing character model visible on the panel’s stage area. At the bottom, additional grids contain clothing or cosmetic thumbnails and smaller UI cards, arranged as multiple rows and columns; some elements are highlighted with yellow outlines and vivid accent colors (purple, blue, red, and orange). Visible interface text includes “BR-RANKED” and a yellow button labeled “Mulai,” along with multiple smaller unreadable labels and icons. The overall composition is layered: the character on grass at the top, then successive dark neon customization screens below, and multiple selection grids at the bottom.

Visible Text: BR-RANKED
Bermuda
Mulai
FIST - BUBBLY WAVES
M1887 - STERLING CONQUEROR
No other important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image is a screenshot of a video game lobby or customization interface showing a character standing on a grassy arena field. The screen also displays weapon/effect panels and selection grids with neon purple and blue glowing UI elements.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
